subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-07-19
subcodes.first_line: My weakened condition and excessive work hamper me, otherwise many extraordinary souls would have arisen among these friends.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ضعف مزاج وکثرت اشتغال مانع است و الا ممکن بود نفوسی خارق العاده در میان این احباء مبعوث شوند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
